title: Assassin's Creed Origins
description: Set in Ancient Egypt during the Ptolemaic period, Assassin's Creed Origins follows Bayek of Siwa, the last Medjay, as he embarks on a journey of revenge that ultimately leads to the formation of the Hidden Ones—the organization that would later become the Assassin Brotherhood. Featuring a vast open world and a complete RPG overhaul, Origins marked a new era for the Assassin's Creed franchise.
benchmarkNotes: Smooth gameplay throughout the open world
